title: Vivi Waits Below
description: On pages 17–19, vivi waits below as luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields.
scene: Vivi Waits Below. Luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.
